data.content: Now let me read the remaining model and service files:
Now I have a full understanding of the codebase. Let me create a comprehensive unit test project.

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-6d375bdd48a641db8f5b8b82c0a39317 && mkdir -p ContosoUniversity.Tests && cd ContosoUniversity.Tests && dotnet new xunit --framework net10.0 --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -5

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the codebase. Let me create a unit test project with thorough tests. I'll use:
- xUnit as the testing framework
- Moq for mocking
- Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory for the in-memory database provider

Let me create the test project structure:
1. A test project with appropriate package references
2. Tests for:
   - StudentsController (CRUD operations, sorting, filtering, pagination)
   - CoursesController (CRUD operations, file upload validation)
   - DepartmentsController (CRUD operations, concurrency handling)
   - InstructorsController (CRUD operations, course assignments)
   - HomeController (Index, About, Contact)
   - NotificationsController (GetNotifications, MarkAsRead)
   - NotificationService (send/receive/mark as read)
   - PaginatedList (pagination logic)
   - Models (validation, computed properties)

<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>

  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net10.0</TargetFramework>

    <Nullable>enable</Nullable>

  </ItemGroup>

  <ItemGroup>

  </ItemGroup>

</Project>

All 174 tests pass across the following test files:

| File | Coverage Area |
|------|--------------|
| `Controllers/StudentsControllerTests.cs` | Index (sort/filter/page), Details, Create, Edit, Delete |
| `Controllers/CoursesControllerTests.cs` | CRUD + file upload validation (extension, size) |
| `Controllers/DepartmentsControllerTests.cs` | CRUD including concurrency scenarios |
| `Controllers/InstructorsControllerTests.cs` | CRUD + course assignments, dept admin nulling |
| `Controllers/HomeControllerTests.cs` | Index, About, Contact, Error, Unauthorized |
| `Controllers/NotificationsControllerTests.cs` | GetNotifications, MarkAsRead, Index |
| `Services/NotificationServiceTests.cs` | Send/receive, message generation, queue ordering |
| `Models/ModelTests.cs` | Validation attributes, computed properties, enums |
| `Data/SchoolContextTests.cs` | EF relationships, CRUD operations |
| `PaginatedListTests.cs` | Pagination logic, boundary conditions |

The tests use **EF Core InMemory** for the database and **Moq** for mocking `IWebHostEnvironment` and `IFormFile`.
